betterquesting:10.desc:
§6Advanced Plating§f

§aCrafting component for advanced NuclearCraft machines.§f

§bAdvanced Plating§f is a key component used to construct most advanced NuclearCraft machines. Requires alloys from the §bAlloy Furnace§f.

§6Used In§f:
§b•§f §bElite Plating§f (advanced plating + boron + beryllium)
§b•§f §bDU Plating§f (advanced plating + depleted uranium)
§b•§f Most §badvanced machines§f and §bmultiblock components§f
§b•§f §bReactor casings§f and walls

§6Production Chain§f:
Copper + Tin → Copper Alloy → Advanced Alloy (with Mg + B) → Advanced Plating.

§eTip§f: Build a dedicated §bManufactory§f chain producing Advanced Plating in bulk before attempting the more expensive plating tiers.
betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Advanced Plating: Mid-Game Machine Component§f

§aAdvanced Plating is the chassis material for mid-game NC and QMD machines.§f
The §bAdvanced Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:1`, ore dict `plateAdvanced`) is a §b§f§cmid-game crafting component§f§f used in nearly every mid-game NC machine and many QMD controllers. It is the §bupgrade from Basic Plating§f and the §bpredecessor to DU Plating§f and §bElite Plating§f.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting + hbm.anvil_construction)§f:
Per the JEI graph, Advanced Plating is crafted via:
- §bVanilla crafting table§f: §b§f§cTough Alloy Ingot§f§f + §bRedstone§f
- §bHBM Anvil Construction§f: §bCopper Coil§f (`hbm:coil_copper`) + §bSteel Anvil§f (`hbm:anvil_steel`) + §bTough Alloy Ingot§f

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
Advanced Plating is consumed in the following mid-game and QMD machines:
- §bQMD Beam Diverter Controller§f (`qmd:beam_diverter_controller`)
- §bQMD Beam Splitter Controller§f (`qmd:beam_splitter_controller`)
- §bQMD Accelerator Ion Source§f (`qmd:accelerator_source`)
- §bQMD Accelerator Ion Collector§f (`qmd:accelerator_ion_collector`)
- §bNC Fluid Infuser§f (`nuclearcraft:infuser`)
- §bNC Melter§f (`nuclearcraft:melter`)
- §bAdvanced Voltaic Pile§f (`nuclearcraft:voltaic_pile_advanced`, per CraftingRecipeHandler.java:180)

§6Why It's Useful§f:
- §bMachine Chassis§f: Advanced Plating is the §b§f§cchassis material§f§f for §b§f§cmid-game machines§f§f in both NC and QMD.
- §bUpgraded Recipe Speed§f: machines built with Advanced Plating have §b§f§cfaster default processing speed§f§f than their Basic Plating counterparts.
- §bQMD Bridge§f: QMD's mid-tier controllers (Beam Diverter, Beam Splitter, Accelerator Ion Source) all use §b§f§cAdvanced Plating§f§f as a key ingredient.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bTough Alloy Ingot§f → from §bAlloy Furnace§f using §bTough Alloy Dust§f blends (Iron + Coal + Limestone)
- §bRedstone§f → from §bRedstone Ore§f mining
- §bCopper Coil§f → from §bHBM Anvil Construction§f using §bCopper Wire§f + §bSteel Rod§f
- §bSteel Anvil§f → from §bHBM Anvil Construction§f using §bSteel Block§f

§eTip§f: Set up a §b§f§cbulk Advanced Plating production line§f§f as soon as you have a §b§f§cstable Alloy Furnace§f§f supply. Advanced Plating is the §b§f§cchassis material§f§f for the next 3-5 NC machines you'll build, and bulk production will save you time and material costs.
